nasb.text: The king of Babylon slaughtered the sons of Zedekiah before his eyes, and he also slaughtered all the princes of Judah in Riblah.

esv.text: The king of Babylon slaughtered the sons of Zedekiah before his eyes, and also slaughtered all the officials of Judah at Riblah.

cnv.text: 巴比倫王在利比拉，當著西底家眼前殺了他的眾子，也殺了猶大所有的領袖，

ccb.text: 当着他的面杀了他的众子和犹大所有的首领，
